I can count by 10s to check: 10, 20, 30, 40. You already know how to count by 10s!

steps.text: You can read bars that end right at the lines. But what if a bar ends between the lines?

params.description: Vertical bar graph appears. Stickers Collected: Emma=30 (at 30 line), Jake=25 (between 20-30 lines), Mia=40 (at 40 line), Leo=35 (between 30-40 lines). Scale of 10, axis 0-50. Ghost gridlines at 5s visible. Jake's bar highlighted.

steps.text: Look at Jake's bar. It doesn't end at a line. It ends between the lines.
Remember half-symbols from scale of 2? Half of 2 was 1. Same idea here. Half of 10 is 5.
Half of 10 is 5. So between 20 and 30, that's 20 plus 5, which equals 25. Jake has 25 stickers.
